name: age_gender_detector
title: Age & Gender Appearance Detector
description: Estimate a coarse age range and binary gender presentation from one public, face-focused image using bounded local ONNX inference.

seo.title: Age & Gender Appearance Detection API
seo.description: Run a bounded local age-range and gender-presentation estimate on one public face image with explicit confidence and limitations.
seo.intro: Age & Gender Appearance Detector keeps inference inside Better Fetch's production image. It returns a coarse Adience age bucket, a binary model presentation label, confidence values, image dimensions, model provenance, and a limitation notice. It is designed for low-stakes aggregate creator research—not identity, exact age, self-described gender, or eligibility decisions.

useCases.title: Low-stakes creator research
useCases.description: Add a clearly labeled visual estimate to a manually reviewed public creator-research workflow.

useCases.title: Model evaluation
useCases.description: Measure confidence and failure modes of a reproducible local appearance classifier on consented test images.

useCases.title: Dataset quality checks
useCases.description: Flag low-confidence, off-center, or unsuitable face imagery for human review without treating predictions as facts.

faqs.question: Does this determine someone's real age or gender?
faqs.answer: No. It returns a fallible appearance estimate from a binary classifier and coarse age buckets. It is not identity, self-described gender, exact age, or age verification.

faqs.question: Is the image sent to an external AI provider?
faqs.answer: No. Better Fetch downloads the bounded public image and runs the baked ONNX models locally.

faqs.question: Can I use this for eligibility or another high-stakes decision?
faqs.answer: No. Do not use it for employment, housing, credit, insurance, law enforcement, access, age verification, or any other high-stakes decision.

image_url.description: Public, face-focused image URL. The https:// prefix is optional.

age_confidence.description: Model confidence for the selected age bucket

gender_presentation.description: Binary appearance label emitted by the model

gender_confidence.description: Model confidence for the presentation label
